name: artisana-root
description: Root package.json to manage the Artisana ecosystem

scripts.build: npm install --prefix ArtisanaWebsite/skillhub-africa/frontend && (cd ArtisanaWebsite/skillhub-africa/frontend && npm run build) && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); console.log('Current CWD: ' + process.cwd()); function findDir(dir, target, depth=0) { if(depth > 5 || dir.includes('node_modules') || dir.includes('.git')) return null; try { const files = fs.readdirSync(dir); for (const f of files) { const p = path.join(dir, f); try { const stat = fs.statSync(p); if (stat.isDirectory()) { if (f === target) return p; const res = findDir(p, target, depth + 1); if (res) return res; } } catch(e){} } } catch(e){} return null; } const foundSrc = findDir('.', '.next'); const dest='.next'; try { if(foundSrc) { console.log('Found source .next at: ' + foundSrc); const absoluteSrc = path.resolve(foundSrc); const absoluteDest = path.resolve(dest); if(fs.existsSync(dest) && absoluteSrc !== absoluteDest) fs.rmSync(dest, {recursive:true, force:true}); if(absoluteSrc !== absoluteDest) { fs.cpSync(foundSrc, dest, {recursive:true}); console.log('Successfully synced .next to root'); } else { console.log('.next is already in root, skipping sync'); } } else { console.error('Could not find .next directory anywhere in the repository.'); process.exit(1); } } catch(e) { console.error(e.message); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix ArtisanaWebsite/skillhub-africa/frontend && cd ArtisanaWebsite/skillhub-africa/backend && pip install -r requirements.txt
